results.title: Rangers' Josh Jung exits with calf tightness after Kyle Higashioka is put on IL
results.description: Josh Jung, the team’s leading hitter with a .294 average, was replaced in the field in the top of the fourth inning.

results.title: Garlie ties for seventh place at MGA Women's Amateur Championship
results.description: A pair of golfers representing the Northfield Golf Club finished among the leaders at the 2026 Minnesota Golf Association Women’s Amateur Championship tournament that was played at the Bearpath Golf and Country Club in Eden Prairie on July 14-16.

results.title: Royals acquire RHP Nate Pearson from Astros

results.title: South Brunswick Recreation Offering Fall Soccer, Tennis For Kids
results.description: Weekly classes for ages 3-11 begin September 13 at Woodlot Park in Monmouth Junction.

results.title: Philipsen sprints to victory in Tour de France stage 17, Pogacar retains overall lead
results.description: VOIRON, France, July 22 - Belgian Jasper Philipsen prevailed in a crowded rush to the finish line to win stage 17 of the Tour de France on Wednesday, moving within seven points of green jersey holder Mads Pedersen, while Tadej Pogacar retained his overall lead.
